notes: level 3 fitout for the office tenancy. the plasterers are finishing the last of the cornices today
painters started on level 2. doing the primer coat on all the plasterboard. 3 painters, they reckon 2 days for primer on the whole floor
carpet tiles were delivered. 180 square meters worth. they look right, checked against the spec sheet. colour is Dulux Warm Grey or whatever the code is
actually the carpet tile colour is called 'Fossil' according to the box. matches the sample the architect approved so all good
the joiner is here measuring up for the reception desk. custom job, hes taking final measurements before fabrication. should be ready to install in 2 weeks
fire services guys are here installing the sprinkler heads on level 3. 4 of them, been going since 7. theyre about half done on this floor
theres a clash between the sprinkler head location and the air con diffuser at grid D5. HVAC guys and fire guys need to sort it out
got them both together, they worked out the diffuser can move 200mm to the east. fire sprinkler stays where it is because of the coverage requirement. easy fix
the electrician is doing the final fix on level 2. power points, light switches, data points. theres a lot of em
data cabling guys finished pulling cables yesterday. 86 data points on level 2 alone. all cat6A
the clients IT guy is coming friday to do the testing and certification on the data cables
ceiling grid is going in on level 3. the ceiling guys are pretty quick, they'll probably finish this floor by end of tomorrow
found a damaged ceiling tile in the box, one of the edges is chipped. pulled it out. we've got spares so no drama
the kitchen joinery was installed yesterday on level 2 but the benchtop has a chip on the front edge. flagged it with the joiner, he's ordering a replacement benchtop
door hardware is being installed today. lever handles, closers, all the commercial grade stuff. theres 34 doors on this floor
one of the door frames on the meeting room is out of plumb by about 5mm. the chippy is going to pack it out and re-fix the architrave
signage guys are here measuring for the building directory and the floor number signs
cleaned up level 2 for the clients walkthrough tomorrow. vacuumed, wiped down all surfaces. looks pretty sharp
made a snag list from my walkthrough. about 15 items. mostly minor stuff. paint touch ups, a couple of switches that are crooked, one power point that doesnt work
emailed the snag list to all the subbies. gave them till friday to close everything out before the client sees it next week
